target:
(The sound of waves, the ferry's sway, the scent of saltwater…
I used to take it for granted
before two years ago)

(It feels so unreal now
I miss it so much)

(The reason I'm back…
It was an unexpected call)

Ah, Mio?
Long time no see.

I'm sorry I couldn't answer.
It seems you called many times,
something happened?

(Feeling a terrible premonition
from her painful voice)

(Is something happened to Alain,
the one who raised me?
Or to my close friend Sou
or my sister Tokiko…?)

(Feeling my heart pounding rapidly,
I focused all my senses
on Mio's voice on the other end--)

(Honestly, I still can't believe it.
Maybe it's better to say I can't accept it)

(Ushio was my childhood friend,
the family I grew up with,
and… )

What are you staring at!
You didn't listen to me again!

I told you.
Close your eyes for a moment.

(W-what's going on…?
You're touching my face way too much…)

A gift!?
I-I don't get it!

Shinpei…
Do you know how long it's been
since you came back to the island?

Huh? Oh…
Since the middle school graduation ceremony…

Yeah, you didn't even come back
for New Year's this year.
Tell everyone I said hi when you get back!

What's going on…?
Ushio… you're coming with me--
Make sure you find me properly.
